criteria.description: Human mode emits an initial pre-review progress indication within two seconds.
Human mode emits bounded ongoing liveness while the gate remains active.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/test_tasks_move_task_pre_review_gate_observability.py; RED commit 808290927 and GREEN commit eb939d7ff
criteria.notes: Historical RED remained test-only and the timing assertion was not weakened.

criteria.description: JSON mode emits exactly one parseable standard-output document for every terminal gate outcome.
criteria.notes: Success, failure, timeout, and catchable cancellation are covered.

criteria.description: JSON progress cannot corrupt standard output.
criteria.notes: Reviewer verified singular JSON output and separated progress.

criteria.description: Timeout and catchable cancellation preserve prior authoritative state before transition mutation.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/agent/test_tasks_move_task_pre_review_gate_observability.py; exact-entry residue matrix across primary, coordination, and lane checkouts
criteria.notes: Snapshots cover events, materialized lane, WP bytes, HEAD/commit count, placement, and owned dirty paths.

criteria.description: Existing escape and synchronization controls remain behaviorally honest.
criteria.notes: Explicit sync-disable remains a truthful skipped/unverified outcome.

criteria.description: Uncatchable termination has deterministic authoritative-state reconciliation.
criteria.evidence: test_sigkill_recovery_reads_prior_authoritative_lane; actual Typer command killed while synchronized inside the real pytest gate
criteria.notes: Linux subreaper fixture reaps the orphaned runner child; no rollback claim is made.
